Computational Implications of Consolidation T
1. Dissociation of retrograde and anterograde amnesia
2. Specify representational content of hippocampus
Episodic memory: Memory of specific event (space/time)
First time to Golden Boy
MTL dependent
Semantic memory: With reactivation of similar events,
transition to more generic knowledge
Dependent on distributed cortical representation
MTL independent

Computational Implications of Consolidation T
1. Dissociation of retrograde and anterograde amnesia
2. Specify representational content of hippocampus
3. Provides process-based account of the kinds of memory
that should be spared following MTL lesions
Changes that occur within a cortical region
(does not required integration across cortical regions)
Priming:
Local reactivation of perceptual trace.
Motor Skills: Associations of successive motor
commands within motor areas.

cc
->

Computational Implications of Consolidation T
1. Dissociation of retrograde and anterograde amnesia
2. Specify representational content of hippocampus
3. Provides process-based account of the kinds of memory
that should be spared following MTL lesions.
4. Novel predictions concerning MTL and memory formation
Descriptive view:
MTL needed for explicit, not implicit
Computational view: MTL needed for context-dependent memory
(combine information across dimensions)
Should hold for both explicit and implicit memories.
